## tscli get policy validate

Validate a policy file

### Synopsis

Validate a policy file using the Tailscale API.
The policy can be provided via --file or --body flag.

```
tscli get policy validate [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --body string   Inline policy JSON
      --file string   Path to policy file, file://path or '-' for stdin
  -h, --help          help for validate
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
  -k, --api-key string   Tailscale API key
  -d, --debug            Dump HTTP requests/responses
  -o, --output string    Output: [json yaml human pretty]
  -n, --tailnet string   Tailscale tailnet (default "-")
```

### SEE ALSO

* [tscli get policy](tscli_get_policy.md)	 - Print the tailnet policy file (HUJSON or JSON)
